name: pipeline-demo
description: Starter project for @jahbini/pipeline-runner. Clone, install, run — see the test pipeline end-to-end including the welcoming hand-off.

scripts.setup:py: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel && .venv/bin/pip install -r ./node_modules/@jahbini/pipeline/requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm run setup:override && npm run setup:py
scripts.clean: rm -rf .venv override override.yaml control_override.yaml state params experiment.yaml runtime.sqlite tested env out data pipeline.json
